final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [31:0] count
);
    
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) 
            count <= 32'b0; // Reset the count to 0
        else if (enable) 
            count <= count + 1; // Increment count if enabled
    end
endmodule
